title: Attached Word document, I can only see the first page.
excerpt:
Hi, 
At my organisation the basic info for our briefs is shared uploading a Word document to the Files section. When I click on the file to read the brief Monday.com only shows me the first page of the brief, but if I do…

posts.author: marco.fuentes (Marco Fuentes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

At my organisation the basic info for our briefs is shared uploading a Word document to the Files section. When I click on the file to read the brief Monday.com only shows me the first page of the brief, but if I download the file I can see all pages, but this is very inconvenient (it’s a waste of time and then I’m left with files on my download folder which I don’t need). This seems to be only happening to me because no one else has reported this glitch to my project manager.

Any idea if this is fixable? Thank you!

Screenshot 2024-12-02 at 11.20.453184×1828 215 KB

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@marco.fuentes

You should be able to click on the “>” in the bottom menu bar to go to the next page. If you have tried that and it’s not working, I recommend contacting support.

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: What Jim said. Be careful, use the > at the bottom of the screen, not the right middle of the screen (that arrow is to go between files)
